title: The Love Doctor
writer: Victor Mapes, Winchell Smith, J. Walter Ruben
actors: Richard Dix, June Collyer, Morgan Farley
plot: Gerald Sumner, a young physician and confirmed bachelor, opens his office and finds that he is without patients until a fond mother brings him her son, Bud Woodbridge, whose malady Sumner diagnoses as "love sickness." Woodbridge, ...
